mapper.insert: insert into notice_tbl values ( notice_seq.nextval, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, sysdate, 0, #{noticePublic}, #{noticeFixed}, #{noticeCategory}, #{noticeImagePath} )
mapper.select: select notice_no, notice_public, notice_fixed, notice_title, notice_content, notice_date, notice_category, notice_image_path from notice_tbl order by notice_fixed desc, notice_date desc
mapper.update: update notice_tbl set notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_public = #{noticePublic}, notice_fixed = #{noticeFixed}, notice_category = #{noticeCategory}, notice_image_path = #{noticeImagePath} where notice_no = #{noticeNo}
mapper.select:
select (select count(*) from member_tbl1) as totalMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = trunc(sysdate, 'MM') then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as thisMonthMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), -1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as lastMonthMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as todayMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate - 1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as yesterdayMember, (select count(case when report_category = '광고' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as ad, (select count(case when report_category = '욕설' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as hate, (select count(case when report_category = '스팸' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as spam, (select count(case when report_category = '기타' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as etc, (select count(*) from board_report_tbl where report_status = 0) as pendingReport,
(select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -28 and enroll_date < sysdate - 21) as fourWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -21 and enroll_date < sysdate - 14) as threeWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -14 and enroll_date < sysdate - 7) as twoWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -7) as oneWeekAgo from dual
select faq_no, faq_title, faq_content, faq_category from faq_tbl

select qna_no, member_id, qna_title, qna_content, qna_status, qna_date, qna_category, qna_question_image from qna_tbl order by qna_status asc, qna_date desc OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: update qna_tbl set qna_answer = #{qnaAnswer}, qna_answer_image = #{qnaAnswerImage}, qna_status = 1 where qna_no = #{qnaNo}
mapper.select: SELECT m.member_id, m.member_name, m.member_nickname, m.member_email, m.member_grade, m.member_thumb, m.member_status, m.enroll_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_tbl b WHERE b.writer_id = m.member_id) AS boardCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment_tbl c WHERE c.board_comment_writer = m.member_id) AS commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_report_tbl r JOIN board_tbl b ON r.board_no = b.board_no WHERE b.writer_id = m.member_id) AS reportCount FROM member_tbl1 m ORDER BY m.enroll_date DESC
